scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT 
    CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(s.fecha AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    CAST(s.fecha AS DATE) AS fecha,
    DATEPART(WEEKDAY, s.fecha) AS dia_semana,
    DATENAME(WEEKDAY, s.fecha) AS nombre_dia,
    DAY(s.fecha) AS dia_mes,
    MONTH(s.fecha) AS mes,
    DATENAME(MONTH, s.fecha) AS nombre_mes,
    DATEPART(QUARTER, s.fecha) AS trimestre,
    YEAR(s.fecha) AS anio,
    CASE 
        WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, s.fecha) IN (6, 7) THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END AS es_fin_semana
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_inscripcion AS DATE) AS fecha
    FROM silver.bja_inscripciones
    WHERE fecha_inscripcion IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_control AS DATE)
    FROM silver.bja_controles_prenatales
    WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_control AS DATE)
    FROM silver.bja_controles_pediatricos
    WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_parto AS DATE)
    FROM silver.bja_partos
    WHERE fecha_parto IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_pago AS DATE)
    FROM silver.bja_pagos
    WHERE fecha_pago IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_inscripcion AS DATE)
    FROM silver.sup_inscripciones
    WHERE fecha_inscripcion IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_control AS DATE)
    FROM silver.sup_controles
    WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_emision AS DATE)
    FROM silver.sup_boletas
    WHERE fecha_emision IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_entrega AS DATE)
    FROM silver.sup_entregas
    WHERE fecha_entrega IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_afiliacion AS DATE)
    FROM silver.spl_afiliaciones
    WHERE fecha_afiliacion IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_entrega AS DATE)
    FROM silver.spl_entregas_agencia
    WHERE fecha_entrega IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_retiro AS DATE)
    FROM silver.spl_entregas_supermercado
    WHERE fecha_retiro IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(DATEFROMPARTS(gestion, mes, 1) AS DATE)
    FROM silver.spl_asignaciones_mensuales
    WHERE gestion IS NOT NULL
      AND mes BETWEEN 1 AND 12

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_recepcion AS DATE)
    FROM silver.as_recepciones
    WHERE fecha_recepcion IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_despacho AS DATE)
    FROM silver.as_despachos
    WHERE fecha_despacho IS NOT NULL

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT CAST(fecha_llegada AS DATE)
    FROM silver.as_despachos
    WHERE fecha_llegada IS NOT NULL
) s',
